About Us

Hazmat Tactical™ was built by a Chicago firefighter and hazmat technician with a singular mission: to provide highly accessible, fiercely practical training resources for responders.

Whether you're an instructor needing fresh drill ideas, an officer leading tabletop sessions, or a department looking for an affordable solution (especially volunteer squads), this platform is built to help you prepare for the real thing.

Please note: The tools generated on this platform are for training purposes only and must never be utilized to dictate tactics during an active incident.

  • Built by a Firefighter
  • Designed for Real Incidents
  • Saves Time Building Drills
  • Affordable for All Departments

© 2026 Hazmat Tactical LLC. All Rights Reserved.

Disclaimer

All materials provided by Hazmat Tactical, including automated drill scenarios and tactical calculators, are intended for educational and training purposes only. These resources are designed to supplement, not replace, the Standard Operating Guidelines (SOGs) and safety protocols established by your Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ).

While every effort is made to ensure mathematical and technical accuracy based on NFPA 470 standards, Hazmat Tactical LLC assumes no liability for the misapplication of this data in live-incident environments. Hazardous materials response is inherently dangerous; always consult your AHJ, local protocols, and onsite Safety Officer before making operational decisions.

Feedback
Responder Feedback

Built by firefighters, for firefighters. Your input shapes what gets built next.

  • Inaccurate chemical data or ERG distances
  • Scenarios that don't reflect realistic training conditions
  • Training features you need that aren't here yet
  • Anything that felt unclear or didn't work as expected
Send Feedback
